sections.changelog:
Update 2.2 - December 02, 2025

  • 🎉 NEW: Feature-Board mode on Kanban view! - Activate the dedicated feature-board mode on a kanban board of your choice. Let users upvote and comment on items with granular control over who can do what.
  • 🎉 NEW: Column sync on Kanban board! - You can activate a new feature to sync item state with the columns on the kanban board. Items automatically move across the board, depening on their current state (to-do, in progress, done).
  • 🎉 NEW: Comment items on drawer! - Add comments to checklist items, now also within the drawer, not just on kanban board.
  • 🎉 NEW: Tutorial Checklist on new installs! - New plugin users will get a checklist created automatically, which guides them through the plugin!
  • 📈 IMPROVE: Automatic language detection! - We now automatically apply the language from the WordPress settings. Only available if we have a translation for that language.
  • 📈 IMPROVE: Even more granular access controls! - Each access and permission can now have multiple rules.
  • 🛠️ FIX: Several Kanban view fixes! - We improved data sync across all views, specifically on Kanban boards.

Update 2.1.2.2 - November 22, 2025

  • 📈 IMPROVE: Shortcode checklist view improvements! - Better alignment, mobile responsiveness and few small things.
  • 🚨 HOTFIX: Checklist cloning / duplication fixed! - Cloning a checklist will now properly clone ALL settings again.

Update 2.1.2.1 - November 20, 2025

  • 📈 IMPROVE: Overall improvements of shortcode checklists! - Proper UI modals for item actions, better rendering of items, feels more intuitive.
  • 🚨 HOTFIX: Fixed checklist view mode on shortcode! - Random 0 are now gone and the shortcode renders properly again when in list mode (not kanban).

Update 2.1.2 - November 17, 2025

  • 🎉 NEW: Kanban View on the frontend! - You can now decide if a shortcode checklist should render as usual (list format) or as a kanban-board.
  • 📈 IMPROVE: Item rendering now looks better! - Improved and fixed a few rendering issues and inconsistencies, making the kanban experience smoother.
  • 🛠️ FIX: Fixing the "Disable floating UI inside page builders" option - Well, it now works again and won't load the floating button when inside pagebuilders.

Update 2.1.1 - October 19, 2025

  • 📈 IMPROVE: More consistent content saving! - Your checklist item content should now save consistently without getting lost, regardless of how the drawer gets closed (like click outside, navigating to a different page etc.).
  • 📈 IMPROVE: Loading indicator on edit checklist! - Small but important: you now have visual feedback for when saving a checklist on the admin page. Comes in handy on larger lists, where saving takes a few seconds.
  • 📈 IMPROVE: Tour connection checking mechanism. - We improved the mechanism which checks if any tour / tour step is connected with a checklist item. Now checklists load and save faster.

Update 2.1.0 - August 22, 2025

  • 🎉 NEW: Kanban-Board view of your checklists and tasks! Enjoy a completely new kanban style view for your checklists and tasks, where you can move tasks from start to finish, assign users to tasks and more!
  • 🎉 NEW: Full i18n internationalization compatibility (translations)! - MagicChecklists is now fully compatible with the i18n standard for translations, which is also what WordPress uses. We introduced full German and French translations to start with. We need your help to get this done faster for your language as well. If you want to help us out, please message us at hello@magicplugins.io
  • 📈 IMPROVE: New save button on checklist creation / edit! - A small one, but necessary for better UX. The "next" button turns into a save button when on the last step.

Update 2.0.6 - July 31, 2025

  • 🛠️ FIX: Item Deadline Modal z-index issue! - Because of a simple z-index issue, the item deadline modal was appearing behind the checklist drawer.

Update 2.0.5 - July 28, 2025

  • 🛠️ FIX: Shortcut availability check! - Fixed the real-time validation of inserting a keyboard shortcut trigger on the edit / create checklist page.
  • 🚨 HOTFIX: Checklist drawer could only be opened when both trigger methods were active. Fixed, so you can enable only the method you actually want to use.

Update 2.0.4 - July 23, 2025

  • 🚨 HOTFIX: Fixed a small issue with floating buttons on mobile. They are now properly draggable and clickable again.

Update 2.0.3 - July 03, 2025

  • 🚨 HOTFIX: Fixed license activation bug and small UI improvements.

Update 2.0.2 - June 28, 2025

  • 🚨 HOTFIX: Fixed an issue where MagicChecklists assets wouldn't load.

Update 2.0.0 - June 27, 2025

  • 🎉 NEW: We welcome a completely new design, interface and codebase! Navigate the plugin pages better and faster, peform actions faster and overall enjoy a new way of creating checklists!
  • 🎉 NEW: Tour Creator! - Ever needed to onboard clients, users or colleagues? Now you can with our built-in tour creator! Visually build tours around your website (frontend AND backend), customize their look and feel and even connect them to a checklist, if needed!
  • 🎉 NEW: Publisher Checklists! - You can now decide between the classic checklists as you know them and publisher checklists. The new checklist type allows you to enable publishing requirements for selected post types. Super helpful for blog posts, for example!
  • 🎉 NEW: MagicChecklists Dashboard widget! - You can optionally enable a new widget that will display the most important information of your checklists right on the WordPress dashboard page!
  • 🎉 NEW: Item locking mechanism! - Enable the item lock setting and mark specific items as locked. Locked items can't be changed from within the drawer. Users with edit permissions can also add their own private items to the checklist—these will be visible only to them!
  • 🎉 NEW: Checklist Analytics! - There is a new page where you get the most important insights for your checklists! This way you know what users click on, which lists perform well and where you can improve.
  • 📈 IMPROVE: Optimized codebase for a faster performance and more consistent loading.
  • 📈 IMPROVE: UX improvements on the drawer! - The drawer has been visually improved to make better use of the available space, while focusing on the most important things: the list items.
  • 📈 IMPROVE: Floating buttons now group automatically! - When there is more than 1 floating button active, they will automatically merge into one general button. Clicking it will show you the available checklist buttons.
  • 📈 IMPROVE: Edit shortcodes on the frontend! - We've added the most important editing aspects to the frontend as well. When you have edit permission, you will see a new button that opens an editing modal for the shortcode checklist.

Update 1.3.5 - February 07, 2025

  • 🎉 NEW: Multi-level list items! - You can now place list items as children inside other list items! Hierarchical items allow you to better group tasks that belong to each other.
  • 📈 IMPROVE: API Endpoints got even better! - We updated the endpoints to accept and handle new checklist settings. Also, there has been a v2 update to the API for easier and safer request handling.
  • 📈 IMPROVE: We handle your API keys even safer now! - Even in an event of a compromised database, your API keys will be save!

Update 1.3.4 - February 03, 2025

  • 🎉 NEW: Show Checklist description in the drawer! - Previously, you could only display a description in the drawer, when the public toggle was switched on. Now you can also optionally display the regular checklist description without havint to make it public!
  • 🎉 NEW: A Central Dashboard for MainWP! - We have developed a custom MainWP extension to manage all your MagicChecklists installations across all your connected websites in one central dashboard! You can create new checklists (even on multiple sites at once), edit existing ones and see which deadlines are approaching! Just generate an API key in the dashboard settings and insert it in the MagicChecklists settings.

Update 1.3.3 - January 24, 2025

  • 🎉 NEW: List item Counters! - There is a new option in the plugin settings to turn on a counter for all list items of a checklist, all checked items and a percentage of checked items.
  • 📈 IMPROVE: Visual validation feedback! - We now have better visual indicators on the create / edit checklist page. Right now, it checks for the only few required fields.

Hotfix Update 1.3.2.1 - January 22, 2025

  • 🚨 HOTFIX: PDF Export works again! - Due to some small changes in the last update, the pdf export broke. It's back to normal again.
  • 🚨 HOTFIX: Item priority selection on edit page! - Due to recent addition of item actions, we misplaced the item priority selection dropdown. Now it's back to its prior position.

Update 1.3.2 - January 13, 2025

  • 🎉 NEW: Custom drawer appearance! - Select the "custom" theme in the checklist settings and you will now be presented a lot of new options to completely customize the appearance of the drawer.
  • 🎉 NEW: Deadlines on list item level! - You can now select a deadline for list items individually. This allows for a really granular deadline control for each task.
  • 🎉 NEW: Set list items to "in progress!" - For easier and more consistent collaboration, you can now toggle the "in progress" status for each individual list item.

Update 1.3.1 - December 23, 2024

  • 🎉 NEW: Images inside list items! - You can now use images inside list items. Simply hover over a list item, click the image icon and insert an image from the media library or directly upload it. We also took care of logged out users with edit permission to be able to do so (plugin specific uploads folder).
  • 🎉 NEW: Export checklists! - We now allow you to export your existing checklists to simple, unformatted txt, pdf with a little customization and to JSON. The JSON export will allow you to completely export and import checklists with all their related settings.
  • 📈 IMPROVE: Better importer! - You can now import any checklist created with MagicChecklists with the exported JSON file of that checklist. Move checklists more easily or even trade with with other users as well!
  • 📈 IMPROVE: Menu item position! - Select your prefered menu item position for MagicChecklists inside the plugin settings.
  • 📈 IMPROVE: Disable floating buttons when inside pagebuilders! - Pretty much speaks for itself. You can optionally disable the floating button of your checklist when currently inside a pagebuilder.

Hotfix Update: 1.3.0.2 - December 16, 2024

  • 🚨 HOTFIX: Shortcode checklist stylings will apply correctly now. There was a small CSS issue for the checklists rendered by shortcode. It's fixed now.

Hotfix Update: 1.3.0.1 - December 15, 2024

  • 🚨 HOTFIX: Drawer will work in all pagebuilders again. We have noticed that the drawer wasn't properly loaded when inside certain pagebuilders. A few adjustments to the loading logic and iframe check and we are back to normal. 😎

Update: 1.3 - December 13, 2024

  • 🎉 NEW: API & Webhook! - We have finally integrated the WordPress REST API into our plugin. We have our own endpoints, which you can use to connect your 3rd party tool to MagicChecklists! Take a look at our documentation to learn more.
  • 🎉 NEW: Automatic Notifications! - You've heard that right – you can now send notifications to a 3rd party tool! Currently we have integrations with Slack and Discord and will include Telegram in the next update. The API is also already usable, although not mentioned anywhere in the settings. We will make the next update focus on the API so you can connect any tool of your choice with MagicChecklists!
  • 🎉 NEW: Shortcodes for Checklists! - You can activate shortcodes for checklists for each checklist individually. You will be presented a bunch of styling options as well as conditions on what should be displayed inside the shortcode. You can also deactivate the drawer here, if you don't need it. Works with every builder that supports shortcodes! Place your checklists anywhere!
  • 🎉 NEW: Automatic Checklist Reset! - You can now set a custom time schedule on which the checklist should reset automatically. This way list items will automatically be unchecked again, perfect for repetitive tasks.
  • 🎉 NEW: Checklist Conditions! - Expanding the access and permission control update from v1.2, you can now set custom conditions for the checklist to be loaded. You can choose between everywhere, wordpress related pages (like dashboard, settings etc.) and even insert custom URLs / URL patterns!
  • 🎉 NEW: Toggle through checklists! - There is a new settings page available inside the plugin pages, so you can activate / deactivate this for all checklists globally. If enabled, you will see 2 arrows inside the drawer, making it easier to toggle through all open checklists without needing to press any shortcuts or floating buttons.
  • 🎉 NEW: Tags & Colors! - What are checklists without any proper organization? Well, we've got you covered. You can now better organize your checklists using tags with associated colors.
  • 🎉 NEW: Uninstaller! - Finally you can properly get rid of all MagicChecklists related data when uninstalling this plugin. We won't leave any junk behind in your database, when this is enabled in the new settings page.
  • 🎉 NEW: Switch form appearance! - You can switch between top to bottom and side by side appearance on the checklist creation / edit form.
  • 📈 IMPROVE: Uninstaller now also deletes the new tables from the database.
  • 📈 IMPROVE: Removed the active checklist limit. You can have as many active checklists as you want.

Update: 1.2 - December 02, 2024

  • 🎉 NEW: Granular Access Control is finally here! Set precise access and permission controls on user roles, individual users, invite link users and on public checklists as well! You can get very granular and pick just the right access and permission needed for each checklist individually.
  • 🎉 NEW: Locking Mechanism. Since multiple users can now edit the same checklist, we need to be consistent with saving the checklist. The locking mechanism is automatically applied on all users with Edit permissions, so that only 1 user can edit the checklist at the same time. This way we ensure data consistency across all users and changes not getting lost anymore.
  • 📈 IMPROVE: We have overhauled the checklist creation process. You will now face a clean, streamlined multip-step form to create and edit checklists. Better UI, more productivity boosted.
  • 🛠️ FIX:
    Some minor fixes in the codebase for better maintainability and scalablity.

Hotfix: 1.1.2.1 - November 19, 2024

  • 🛠️ FIX: I got too excited adding the public checklist handling methods. I forgot about non-public checklists. 'Per User' checked state handling now works again for non-public checklists.

Update: 1.1.2 - November 19, 2024

  • 🎉 NEW: Clickable Links and More! You can now paste URLs into a list item and it will be converted into a hyperlink automatically. Additionally you can select any existing text which will trigger a link insertion popup. This way you can turn any text into a hyperlink!
  • 🎉 NEW: Rate Limiting. You can now optionally enable rate limits for your checklists individually. This is especially handy for public checklists on websites that are prone to bots or spamers.
  • 📈 IMPROVE: Got rid of the CDN depency for SortableJS. It is now its own file.
  • 📣 ANNOUNCEMENT: Now we will focus fully on the granular access control system. This will also include a complete overhaul of the current checklist creation process. We will make it way more userfriendly and appealing to use. Think of multi step forms. Stay tuned. 👀

Update Info: 1.1.1.1 - November 14, 2024

  • INFO: You have to set a trigger for your checklist to open when updating to the latest version. This is because you can now decide to either use only shortcuts, only floating buttons or both.
  • IMPROVE: UI changes of the drawer to make it easier to use, especially on mobile.

Update: 1.1.1 - November 14, 2024

  • NEW: Introducing part 1 of the granular access control: Public Access. Enable public access to your checklist. Visitors can open it either through the shortcut, or through a floating button. Visitors can check off items, uncheck them again and rearrange the order of list items. Every user will have his/her own checked state handling (per user). An example can be seen on the MagicPlugins website.
  • NEW: Floating Buttons! Now you can decide how checklists should open. Switch on/off Shortcuts (the standard way) and Floating Buttons. You can even use both at the same time.
  • FIX: Fixed a small loading issue within Bricksbuilder, where 2 instances of checklists were loaded. Now it correctly loads one instance in the main DOM and propagates shortcut inputs from within the Bricks iframe to the Bricks main DOM.

Update: 1.1.0 - November 07, 2024

  • NEW: Added a priority selector on checklist and list item level. Priorities will be visible by an indicating color OR number.
  • IMPROVE: Small UI update: remove button and drag handle will now only be visible while hovering over an item.
  • IMPROVE: Complete restructure of the codebase. It's now modular to allow granular control over what files should load on which trigger. This is also the first step towards Granular Access control.

Official Release: 1.0.0 - November 03, 2024

  • RELEASE: We finally made it! This update marks the first official release of MagicChecklists!
  • IMPROVE: Minor optical improvements
  • IMPROVE: Limit of active checklists set from 5 to 10. There is a limit in the first place to keep performance lightning fast.

Beta 1.2.0 – November 01,2024

  • NEW: A little confetti animation when checking off all list items.
  • NEW: A new button to uncheck all list items inside the drawer.
  • IMPROVE: A revamp of the UI to make it ready for official release.
  • IMPROVE: Better documentation on all MagicChecklist plugin pages.
  • IMPROVE: Ensured compatibility with Pagebuilders like Bricks and Elementor.
  • FIX: Shortcut binding form field now works as intended and can be exited with mouse, Enter or Tab.

1.1.2 – October 28, 2024

  • Added new Delete All button on the edit page
  • Replaced the remove text with a short, red x
  • Really small UI changes. UI will be revamped at official launch.
  • Bug fix: no more endless item duplication inside the drawer, when creating new items after closing the drawer multiple times without a pagereload

1.1.1 – October 27, 2024

  • A few changes to the UI for a smoother navigation.

1.0.0 – October 25, 2024

  • Initial Beta Release
